goals: Home Works desktop renders up to 8 items as 2 rows x 4 columns.
Home Works mobile renders one column and only 4 visible cards.
Work and Study detail reading content uses a white surface in light mode.
changed: backend home featured works limit changed from 4 to 8
home featured works render guard slices to 8
home featured works grid changed to 1/2/4 responsive columns
home featured works after index 3 are hidden below md breakpoint
blog and work detail body containers use bg-card white reading surfaces
backend and Playwright tests updated for new behavior

validations.command: PLAYWRIGHT_EXTERNAL_SERVER=1 PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:13000 npx playwright test tests/ui-improvement-featured-works-grid.spec.ts --project=chromium-public --grep 'eight DOM cards|two columns on tablet and four on desktop' --workers=1

PLAYWRIGHT_EXTERNAL_SERVER=1 PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:13000 npx playwright test tests/ui-quality-blog-detail-visuals.spec.ts --project=chromium-authenticated --grep 'white reading surface' --workers=1

PLAYWRIGHT_EXTERNAL_SERVER=1 PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:13000 npx playwright test tests/public-detail-toc-fallback.spec.ts tests/public-blog-toc-layout.spec.ts tests/public-work-toc.spec.ts --project=chromium-public --workers=1

risks: Hidden mobile Works cards remain in DOM intentionally for server-rendered markup stability.
Detail body padding reduces inner text width, though TOC and related-layout regressions passed.
Lint still reports 5 unrelated pre-existing warnings.
recommendation: Open a dev PR and let CI validate the slice before merging.
